name: clinerules
description: Deploys planning-* rules to ~/.cline/rules/ (Cline's native global rules directory) and keeps the @-import block in ~/.claude/CLAUDE.md in sync so Claude Code loads the same rules.

plugins.name: clinerules
plugins.description: Deploys planning-* rules globally to ~/.cline/rules/ for Cline and regenerates the @-import block in ~/.claude/CLAUDE.md for Claude Code. Run deploy.zsh to install or update.
